expectations.text: Reuses the existing reindexCatalog use-case in core rather than duplicating its logic
expectations.evidence: 'imports the same reindexCatalog'; 'the reindex logic itself does not move'

expectations.text: Adds the new CLI as an entrypoint under run/ (how it's run)
Wires the same adapters (ProductStore, SearchIndex) into the CLI entrypoint
expectations.evidence: Constructs PostgresProductStore + ElasticSearchIndex, same as server

expectations.text: Keeps the CLI entrypoint thin — no business logic added to run/
expectations.evidence: 'Don't put reindex logic in reindexCli.ts; only construct, call, and report'

expectations.text: Does not introduce a new outward dependency from core to make this work
expectations.evidence: 'core gains a second driver without learning anything about HTTP or cron'; core untouched
